title: lomatium donnellii
intro: Lomatium donnellii, also known as Donnell's lomatium, is a perennial plant native to the northwestern United States and southwestern Canada. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of health issues, including respiratory problems, such as colds and flu, as well as digestive issues and skin conditions. Lomatium donnellii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal benefits.
